name: GIGABYTE B460M DS3H V2 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel B460 Chipset - Supports DDR4-2933 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - D-Sub - DVI-D - HDMI - Intel GbE LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE B460M DS3H V2 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200
description: Budget Micro ATX motherboard for Intel 10th gen with B460 chipset and multiple video outputs.
